nasb.text: And coming to Him as to a living stone which has been rejected by men, but is choice and precious in the sight of God,

esv.text: As you come to him, a living stone rejected by men but in the sight of God chosen and precious,

cnv.text: 主是活石，雖然被人棄絕，卻是　神所揀選所珍貴的；你們到他面前來，

ccb.text: 主是活石，虽然被人弃绝，却被上帝拣选、视为宝贵。

csbs.text: 你们来到那活石面前——他虽然被人弃绝，却是神所拣选、所珍贵的——
